University of Guelph-Humber

Guelph-Humber
Pre-Law Society

Empowering students to explore the legal profession through advocacy, mooting, and community. Building the next generation of legal minds at UofGH.

Learn More Get Involved

What We Do

Advocacy, community, and education for aspiring legal professionals.

See our competition results from moot courts across Canada.

The GH Cup

Our flagship annual moot court competition.
